params.name: Mummy Juanita
params.description:
On Nov 15, 1546 AD, Juanita was taken to the top of Ampato mountain where she met her end.
Juanita is a mummy from several hundred years ago and is one of the best-preserved mummies in the world. Based on various factors such as the discovery site and accompanying burial objects, it is believed that this Incan girl died as a sacrificial offering. Due to the freezing conditions, her biological features have been perfectly preserved, not only does she look like she did when she was alive, but a …
